head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland, Auckland and Coromandel
Mostly fine. Isolated showers, mainly about eastern areas north of Auckland City.
Waikato to Taumarunui, including Bay of Plenty and Taupo
Partly cloudy. Isolated showers about Waikato and Waitomo.
Gisborne to Wairarapa, including Taihape and Wellington.
Fine today. Period of showers tomorrow.
Taranaki to Kapiti Coast
Mostly cloudy. Few showers mainly north of Levin, clearing by midday tomorrow.
Nelson, Marlborough and Canterbury
Mainly fine, but period of showers in Canterbury overnight, with a few early showers elsewhere tomorrow.
Buller, Grey and Westland
Showers increasing today, clearing overnight. One or two showers in Grey and northern Westland tomorrow evening.
Fiordland, Southland and Otago
A period of rain this afternoon or evening, briefly heavy south of Dunedin, then becoming mainly fine.
Chatham Islands
Partly cloudy. Brief showers tomorrow morning.
Friday

North Island: A few light showers about Northland. Mostly fine elsewhere.
South Island: A few showers about the Fiords. Generally fine elsewhere, but partly cloudy and a morning showers possible for northern Westland and Grey.
Saturday

North Island: A few light showers about Northland. Mostly fine elsewhere.
South Island: A few showers about the Fiords and Stewart Island. Generally fine elsewhere.
Sunday

North Island: A few light showers about Northland. Mostly fine elsewhere.
South Island: A few showers about the Fiords and Stewart Island. Generally fine elsewhere.
Chatham Islands
Mainly fine, but a few light showers developing on Sunday. Southwesterlies.
Issued: 1:36pm Wednesday 29 Apr 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
